===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan - In The Garden 2001 Nov. 19th 2001 plus Fillers_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - "In The Garden 2001" Madison Square Garden, November 19th 2001 plus Fillers (Factory Pressed Discs) 

BOB DYLAN
"In The Garden 2001"
Madison Square Garden
New York City
New York, USA
November 19th 2001

plus Fillers

RATTLESNAKE RS 104/105/106

SOURCE: Factory Pressed Discs > Soundforge PRO10b > FLAC Level 6 Align on Sector Boundaries

300dpi Artwork Scans Included

JTT, February 2011

Disc One
01. Wait For The Light To Shine
02. It Ain't Me Babe
03. Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
04. Searching For A Soldier's Grave
05. Tweedle Dee And Tweedle Dum
06. Just Like A Woman
07. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues
08. Lonesome Day Blues
09. High Water
10. Don't Think Twice
11. Tangled Up In Blue

Disc Two
01. John Brown
02. Summer Days
03. Sugar Baby
04. Drifter's Escape
05. Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
06. Things Have Changed
07. Like A Rolling Stone
08. Forever Young
09. Honest With Me
10. Blowin' In The Wind
11. All Along The Watchtower

Disc Three
Van Andel Arena, Grand Rapids, Michigan November 6th 2001
01. Humming Bird
02. This World Can't Stand Long
03. Cry A While
04. Every Grain Of Sand
05. Floater
06. Tombstone Blues
07. Po' Boy
08. It's All Over Now Baby Blue

Spokane Arena, Spokane, Washington October 5th 2001
09. Blind Willie McTell
10. Tomorrow Is A Long Time
11. Watching The River Flow
12. Knockin' On Heaven's Door

Key Arena, Seattle, Washington October 6th 2001
13. Moonlight

United Center, Chicago, Illinois October 27th 2001
14. Mississippi 

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
PLEASE DO NOT CONVERT TO .MP3 ETC. AND OFFER IN PUBLIC
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
